name: "✨ Feature Request"

labels: ["type: feature", "status: needs-triage"]
assignees: []

## Problem / Job-to-be-Done

<!-- Describe the problem you're facing, not the solution.
Example: "As a DevOps engineer, I need to verify that my cron jobs are running because silent failures
are costing us real money and we only discover them when customers complain." -->



## Proposed Solution

<!-- What you'd like to see. Stay at the "what", not the "how" — the maintainers will handle the "how". -->



## Why This Belongs in Ogoune

<!-- Explain the fit with the product mission: simple, self-hosted uptime monitoring.
If this is an edge case or niche use, say so — it helps us prioritise correctly. -->



## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What have you tried? Why doesn't it work for your use case? -->



## Open Core Boundary

<!-- Where do you think this feature belongs? -->

- [ ] **Community Edition** — everyone should have this for free
- [ ] **Enterprise Edition** — makes sense only in a hosted / multi-tenant context
- [ ] **Not sure** — happy to discuss

## Target Persona

<!-- Who is the primary beneficiary of this feature? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Solo developer / indie hacker
- [ ] SRE / DevOps in a startup
- [ ] Platform team in a scale-up
- [ ] Enterprise / DSI
